title: Required Medication Unavailable Before Execution
scenario: A medication administration workflow reaches execution, but the required medication is unavailable in the dispensing system.
initial_state: The medication order was authorized while the medication was expected to be available.
state_transition: The required medication becomes unavailable before administration.
execution_boundary: Medication administration is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution admissibility requires reconstruction of required resource availability at execution time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the required medication resource is unavailable at the execution boundary.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when a required resource is unavailable before execution.
